guardrails.note: Read-only popular prompt sprint board. It groups broad industry AI prompt lanes into manual review waves without creating, editing, reviewing, or publishing articles.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before article creation, article edits, mark:review, and publish until a human approves the exact files and changes.

playbookGuardrails.note: Read-only popular AI prompt playbook. It maps broad, commonly searched AI prompt topics to existing candidate drafts, official sources, and human-review prompt templates.
playbookGuardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review and publish. Every article change still requires explicit human approval.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: No keyword volume, ranking, impression, click, traffic, conversion, or revenue claim is made.
